text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How did you spend your day off? I protected the
peace in the town with Biko!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Collecting trash, patrolling the area... We even
put on a superhero performance in the park!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? A fantastically fulfilling day
off for a class representative and model student,
if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Sakura Bakushin O was able to enjoy her
day off in her own unique way.
